data.title: American Eagle Shares Drop After Q3 Results, Weak Holiday Guidance: Details
data.description: American Eagle Outfitters shares are dropping after the company reported its third-quarter results after Wednesday's closing bell.

data.title: SonarX Partners With Amazon To Integrate On-Chain Datasets Into AWS
data.description: SonarX announced on Wednesday that it has partnered with Amazon's AWS, along with the teams at Base, Arbitrum, Provenance Blockchain, Aptos, and Ripple, to bring its indexed on-chain datasets to AWS's Open Data program.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Recover From Mid-Day Slump, Close Day Strong On Powell's 'Digital Gold' Remarks
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading higher on Wednesday, bolstered by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell calling it “digital gold.”

data.title: AeroVironment Stock Falls On Q2 Earnings: The Details
data.description: AeroVironment reported second-quarter revenue of $188.5 million, up from $180.8 million year-over-year, according to Benzinga Pro.
